texto: Defeating depression is like playing the carnival game Whac-a-mole. You have to give it your all and be on target to beat that sucker down when it pops up again and again. If you pay attention, learn from your past efforts, and keep at it, you can win." -Mel. Edwards
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mel Edwards: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Defeating depression is like playing the carnival game Whac-a-mole. You have to give it your all …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, depression, mental-health pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mental-health.
